rag_rules: Assume statements must be placed in component types, not implementations
AGREE contracts are scoped to component types unless bindings require implementation annexes
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics pointing to implementation scope in type annexes should be resolved by moving valid bindings or removing invalid clauses
AGREE scalar types must use int, real, or bool; avoid package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Placing assume statements in component implementations instead of types
Using undefined or package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Model Analyst extraction of component structure
